_description: Drop4 UI asset manifest. Each entry generates one PNG via Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image). Run: node tools/gen-art.mjs [--only=<group>] [--force] [--dry-run]
_style_lockup: Every prompt should include the shared style lockup so the full UI pack reads as one game. If you tweak this, regenerate with --force so nothing drifts.
_style_lockup_text: Premium mobile game UI asset for 'Drop4', a stylized Connect-4 game. Dark navy background, neon orange and warm gold accents, subtle purple highlights, glossy plastic + metal material mix. Flat but dimensional, no text, clean edges, slight inner glow, drop shadow. Mobile game polish like Basketball Stars or Candy Crush Saga. No clutter, no borders, centered subject. Render as a transparent PNG.

items.prompt: Premium mobile game icon: a small glossy house with a warm glowing window, facing camera straight on. Dark navy + orange accents, neon rim light, slight gold reflection. Centered, transparent background, no text. Mobile game polish like Basketball Stars or Candy Crush.

Premium mobile game icon: a bullseye target with a dart stuck dead-center. Glossy orange and navy, neon rim light, gold glint on the dart tip. Centered, transparent background, no text. Mobile game polish.
Premium mobile game icon: a backpack with a glowing gem poking out the top. Glossy orange + navy, neon rim, gold zippers. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Premium mobile game icon: a stylized bust silhouette inside a glowing circular frame, like a character portrait plaque. Glossy navy + orange, gold ring accent. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: a glossy shopping bag with a small star hanging off it. Orange handles, navy body, gold star. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Wide premium mobile-game card background, 4:1 aspect ratio. Cinematic arena battle scene: two silhouetted Connect-4 boards facing off on a glossy hex-tile floor, warm orange spotlight pooling in the center, embers rising, magenta nebula bokeh top-right, cyan energy sparks top-left. Dramatic rim light on the boards. Saturated orange-to-deep-crimson gradient sky. Painterly, AAA mobile aesthetic like a Clash Royale / Apex Legends card. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers, NO logos, NO UI chrome. Edges softly fade to black so the card reads against any background. Polished, premium.

Wide premium mobile-game card background, 4:1 aspect ratio. Epic city skyline panorama at golden hour: silhouetted skyscrapers across a deep purple-to-magenta dusk sky, warm windows glowing yellow, a brilliant gold trophy-shaped beam of light rising from the center of the city skyline to the top. Subtle volumetric haze, scattered star accents. Painterly, AAA mobile aesthetic. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers, NO UI. Edges softly fade so the card reads against any background. Polished, premium.

Wide premium mobile-game card background, 4:1 aspect ratio. Cozy co-op living-room vibe filtered through a sci-fi lens: two glossy game controllers facing each other on a clean teal-to-cyan glass floor, a warm white spotlight between them, faint dotted energy arc connecting the two controllers, soft bokeh halos. Deep navy-to-teal gradient sky. Painterly, AAA mobile aesthetic. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers, NO UI. Edges softly fade so the card reads against any background. Polished, premium.

Portrait mobile game lobby background, 9:16 aspect ratio. Cinematic stage for a Sims-meets-Fortnite premium lobby: deep navy-to-black cosmic sky upper 60 percent with drifting magenta and cyan nebula wisps plus glittering white star dust and a single soft lens flare; lower 40 percent is a raked perspective stage floor built from glossy hexagonal tiles emitting warm orange spotlight pooling toward the center, soft gold light rays fanning up and out from the stage. Scattered holographic HUD accents far in the background (rank chevrons, tiny coin sparkles, faint vertical energy lines) but absolutely NO text, NO letters, NO character, NO logo, NO UI elements, NO buttons. Premium AAA mobile aesthetic like the Apex Legends main lobby crossed with The Sims 4 Create A Sim menu crossed with Fortnite locker. Polished, painterly, highly saturated but readable, high contrast, clean, no banding, no JPEG artifacts. Focus soft, painterly bokeh, mood energetic and expensive. 4K quality.

Portrait mobile game shop background, 9:16 aspect ratio. Luxurious cosmic marketplace vibe: deep navy-to-black upper sky filled with drifting magenta and cyan nebula wisps plus glittering white stars, center focal point an elegant floating holographic vitrine display podium glowing warm gold with a soft light column rising through it, lower 30 percent a glossy dark hexagonal tile floor catching faint reflections. Scattered coin sparkles + floating geometric facets (diamond shards) in the mid-ground. NO text, NO letters, NO characters, NO logos, NO UI elements. Premium AAA mobile aesthetic like the Fortnite Item Shop merged with an Apple Store display. Polished, painterly, highly saturated but readable, soft bokeh focus, expensive feel.
Portrait mobile game background: stylized city skyline at sunset (Brooklyn-coded), orange-purple sky, silhouetted buildings, warm windows glowing, dusky clouds. No characters, no text.

Portrait mobile game profile / trophy hall background, 9:16 aspect ratio. Regal cosmic hall of fame: deep purple-to-navy starry sky with subtle aurora ribbons, lower 40 percent a grand marble podium stage with warm gold spotlight beams fanning up and out from the center, silhouetted trophy / crown silhouettes blurred far in the background at different depths, floating gold dust particles. Scattered holographic rank chevrons in bokeh. NO text, NO letters, NO characters, NO UI. Painterly, AAA mobile aesthetic. Polished, warm regal mood, premium.

Mobile game item card frame: 9-slice compatible, dark navy interior, glossy metallic border, subtle corner rivets, neon orange inner rim line. No text, transparent center, edges define the frame. Premium polish.

Mobile game portrait frame: ornate gold circular ring, sports-card-style bevel and engraved detail, slight wear, inner shadow. No content in center (transparent), edges define the frame. Like an NBA 2K MyPlayer portrait ring.

Premium mobile game coin: a thick golden coin, face-on perspective, glossy bevel, raised central emblem (simple round medallion, no letters), warm gold + soft orange gleam, subtle rim highlight. Centered, transparent background, no text or numerals. Looks like a Candy Crush or Basketball Stars game coin.

Premium mobile game gem: a cut sapphire-blue gemstone, pointed octahedral shape, brilliant facets, deep blue core with bright cyan highlights, faint purple rim, glowing inside. Centered, transparent background, no text. Looks like a premium-currency gem in a polished mobile game.

Premium mobile game flame icon: a stylized glossy red-orange flame with a bright warm-yellow core, single tongue of fire, slight curl at the top, neon rim glow. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a streak or fire meter.
Premium mobile game icon: a glossy t-shirt on a hanger, slightly angled. Warm orange shirt, navy hanger hook, gold rim light. Centered, transparent background, no text. Mobile game polish.

Premium mobile game icon: a Connect-4 style grid board seen at a slight 3/4 angle, dark navy frame, blue circles cut out, one red and one yellow piece dropped in. Glossy plastic. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: two glossy plastic game-piece discs, one red on top-left, one yellow on bottom-right, overlapping slightly, soft shadow. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Premium mobile game icon: a four-pointed sparkle star with rays of light, glowing warm yellow core, purple rim, tiny supporting sparkles. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a visual effect or drop effect.
Premium mobile game icon: a chunky gold trophy cup with a starburst behind it, glossy gold, navy handles, tiny red gem set in the base. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: an ornate square picture frame with a gold rim and navy interior, empty center, slight 3/4 angle, subtle glow inside. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: a glossy speech bubble with a smiling face inside, warm orange bubble, navy face, gold rim. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Premium mobile game icon: a stylized dog face, friendly, slightly chubby, glossy fur, big shiny eyes, warm brown-and-cream colors, soft pink tongue peeking out. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: a glossy wrapped gift box, warm orange paper, gold ribbon in a neat bow, slight glow escaping from under the lid, 3/4 angle. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Premium mobile game sparkle particle: a simple four-pointed white-to-gold star with bright core and soft halo glow, fading to transparent edges. Centered, transparent background, no text. Tileable VFX sprite for celebration bursts.

Premium mobile game celebration burst: a cluster of small glossy gold coins flying outward from center, golden light rays behind, warm soft glow. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a coin-pickup burst moment.

Premium mobile game victory hero element: a large gleaming gold trophy cup with a bright sunburst behind it, purple-to-navy radial backdrop fading to transparent, confetti particles in the air, subtle gold dust. Centered, transparent background except the sunburst, no text. Hero element for the win screen.

Premium mobile game lighting element: a warm golden spotlight beam cone pointing straight down on a dark navy surface, illuminating a soft circular glow on the floor, subtle dust particles in the beam. Centered composition, rest of frame transparent, no text. Meant to sit behind a character on a home-screen stage.

Premium mobile game stage floor element: a wide glossy circular platform disc seen at a low angle, dark navy top with a neon orange rim light and subtle blue inner glow, slight reflection on the surface, floating in transparent space. Centered, transparent background, no text. Goes under a character on the home lobby.

Premium mobile game wordmark, transparent background isolated. The single word DROP4 in chunky hand-painted 3D block letters, glossy warm orange-to-deep-crimson gradient fill with a bright yellow-white bevel highlight at the top edge, bold gold rim outline, subtle magenta glow halo behind the letters. The 4 is stylized as a minimal Connect-4 game board with a single bright red disc dropping into the rightmost slot. Faint warm ember sparkles floating around the letters. Letters fill most of the canvas edge-to-edge. Absolutely NOTHING else in the image besides the word itself and the drop-shadow-glow around the letters. NO additional text, NO subtitle, NO tagline, NO borders, NO frames, NO characters, NO logos. Premium AAA mobile-game logo polish like Brawl Stars or Clash Royale wordmarks. Painterly, glossy, high contrast, very saturated.

Premium mobile game round icon, transparent background isolated. A glossy orange-and-gold circular medallion featuring in its center a chibi-style silhouetted figure caught mid-dance with one arm raised high and a slight hip twist, energetic joyful pose. The medallion has a thick bright gold rim with tiny sparkle highlights, a soft magenta glow halo around the medallion, and small musical-note icons floating around the figure. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers. Centered, premium AAA mobile-game icon polish. Glossy, painterly, very saturated.

Premium mobile game round icon, transparent background isolated. A glossy orange-and-gold circular medallion featuring in its center a chibi-style silhouetted figure standing in a confident hands-on-hips pose with a slight lean. The medallion has a thick bright gold rim with tiny sparkle highlights, a soft cyan glow halo around the medallion, and small motion-line accents around the figure suggesting calm idle breathing. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers. Centered, premium AAA mobile-game icon polish. Glossy, painterly, very saturated.

Horizontal elongated rounded rectangle banner, 4:1 aspect ratio, NOT a circle, NOT a coin, NOT a medallion â€” a stretched lozenge bar shape like a racing stripe or a name-plate tag. The shape spans edge-to-edge of the canvas horizontally and only ~half the canvas vertically. Centered, transparent background, no text, no icons, no characters, no additional decorations. Represents the 'Common' tier label plate.

Premium mobile app icon: a chunky glossy red Connect-4 style disc with a large numeral '4' engraved into its face, warm orange rim light, subtle neon glow, sitting inside a rounded-square icon backdrop that fades from deep navy to warm orange radial glow behind the disc. Centered, fills the square, no text anywhere â€” the '4' on the disc is the only glyph and must be bold and readable. Designed for iOS/Android home-screen icons at small sizes. Polished like Candy Crush or Basketball Stars app icons.

Premium mobile game splash-screen hero: a giant chunky glossy red Connect-4 style disc floating in space, a single numeral '4' engraved on its face, sparks and warm golden light rays radiating outward, subtle Connect-4 board silhouette in the blurred background, navy-to-warm-orange radial backdrop fading to transparent at the edges. Centered, dominant subject. The only glyph anywhere is the '4' on the disc. No other text, no wordmark.

Premium mobile game locked slot: a dark navy silhouette of a question mark inside a glossy circular portrait frame, faint orange rim light, small padlock icon at the bottom-right corner. Centered, transparent background, no other text. Used for unrevealed career opponents.

Premium mobile shop featured-deal banner background: a dynamic diagonal gradient from deep purple to warm orange with sparkle dust and subtle lens-flare streaks, faint cascading gold coin silhouettes in the background blur, soft vignette on the edges. No text, no logos, just the atmospheric backdrop ready for a deal card to sit on top. Edges fade toward transparent.

Premium mobile game level-up VFX hero: a radial sunburst of warm golden light rays exploding from center, confetti particles, soft glowing rings expanding outward, warm orange-to-white gradient core, fades to transparent at the edges. Centered, transparent background, no text. Used as an overlay when the player levels up.

Premium mobile game icon: a glossy triangular 'play' arrow symbol pointing right, chunky and beveled, warm orange gradient with bright rim highlight and subtle inner glow. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents the main play / quick-match mode button.

Premium mobile game icon: a glossy gold trophy cup with a purple neon rim glow behind it, a single star on the cup's face, dark navy handles, subtle gold sparkles. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents career mode progression.

Premium mobile game icon: two glossy smartphone silhouettes angled toward each other, slight overlap, warm teal rim light between them, soft glow connecting line. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents local pass-and-play mode.

Portrait mobile game missions/challenges background, 9:16 aspect ratio. Dynamic combat-ready arena: deep crimson-to-orange sunset sky with volumetric god-rays, silhouetted floating battle platforms at different depths, streaking motion lines across the scene suggesting fast action, glowing orange and cyan energy sparks scattered. Lower half a dark glossy obsidian floor catching bright reflections. NO text, NO letters, NO characters, NO UI. Painterly, AAA mobile aesthetic like an Apex Legends mission briefing crossed with Destiny 2 strike screen. Premium, energetic, high contrast.

Portrait mobile game background: glossy spotlit stage floor with a subtle Connect-4 board pattern visible in the distance, warm orange spotlight pool at bottom center fading to dark navy top, faint purple nebula flecks. No characters, no text, no borders. Premium polish.

Portrait mobile game arena backdrop: dramatic clash lighting, orange-vs-blue split with a vertical light beam splitting the composition in half, subtle crowd silhouettes faint in the background, motion-blur streaks radiating outward from center, dark navy floor reflecting the lights. No characters, no text, no borders. Feels like a boxing-match weigh-in staging. Premium polish.
Premium mobile game icon: a glossy green leaf with dew drops, chibi-cute style, soft emerald rim light. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents 'Easy' casual difficulty.

Premium mobile game icon: a glossy crossed-swords emblem, warm orange blades, gold cross guard, slight spark at the intersection point. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents 'Medium' difficulty.

Premium mobile game icon: a glossy red-orange flame skull, chunky stylized, bright white-hot core, smoky wisp curling above. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents 'Hard' punishing difficulty.

Premium mobile game VS clash element: the letters 'V' and 'S' rendered as chunky 3D glossy block type, warm orange-to-red gradient on the letters with gold rim highlights, an explosive yellow-white starburst behind them, lightning cracks radiating outward, smoke wisps at the base. Centered, transparent background except the element itself. The only glyphs are the VS â€” no other text. Hero clash element used between two fighting characters on a matchup screen.

Premium mobile game loot crate: a chunky wooden treasure chest with bronze metal bands and studs, slightly open with a warm glow escaping, bronze padlock on the front, chibi stylized proportions. Three-quarter angle. Centered, transparent background, no text. Polished like Clash Royale or Brawl Stars loot chests.

Premium mobile game loot crate: a polished silver metal chest with chrome rivets and a brushed finish, slightly open with a bright cyan glow escaping, silver clasp on the front, chibi stylized proportions. Three-quarter angle. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Premium mobile game loot crate: a glossy gold treasure chest with elaborate filigree trim, sparkle dust around it, slightly open with a blinding warm-white glow escaping, gold ornate clasp on the front, chibi stylized proportions. Three-quarter angle. Centered, transparent background, no text. The top-tier loot box, legendary quality.

Premium mobile game challenge icon: a glossy martial-arts medallion with a karate-belt ribbon, warm orange belt, gold medal center with a stylized fist emblem, small sparkle dust. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a 'dominant force' daily challenge.

Premium mobile game challenge icon: three stylized glossy fireballs stacked in a hat-trick arrangement, warm orange cores with yellow-white hot centers, subtle smoke trails. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a 'hat trick' win-streak challenge.

Premium mobile game challenge icon: a chunky glossy chrome skull with red eye-sockets, slight battle-wear, subtle smoke curling from the top. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a 'hard knocks' high-difficulty win challenge.

Premium mobile game challenge icon: a glossy gold trophy cup with a bright red '20' numeral plate on the front, sparkle dust around, star on top. Centered, transparent background, no text OTHER than the '20' numeral on the plate. Represents a 'win 20 games this week' weekly challenge trophy.

Premium mobile game challenge hero icon: a glossy reward bag tied with a gold ribbon, warm orange fabric, gold tag hanging off it, small warm glow from inside the opening. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a daily-challenge reward bag.

Premium mobile game stat icon: a glossy green checkmark inside a small circle backdrop, chunky 3D, bright lime rim highlight. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents the 'wins' player stat.
Premium mobile game stat icon: a glossy red X mark, chunky 3D, bright crimson rim highlight. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents the 'losses' player stat.

Premium mobile game stat icon: a glossy golden percent symbol (%) rendered as chunky 3D with bevel and highlight. Centered, transparent background, no text OTHER than the % symbol itself. Represents win-rate percentage.
Premium mobile game stat icon: a glossy game controller silhouette, chunky navy-and-orange, gold button accents. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents total games played.

Premium mobile game action icon: a glossy warm-yellow lightbulb with a bright filament glow, slight chibi proportions, subtle sparkle at the top. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a 'hint' gameplay helper.

Premium mobile game action icon: a glossy blue circular arrow curving counter-clockwise, chunky 3D, cyan rim light, small motion spark at the tip. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents an 'undo last move' gameplay action.

Premium mobile game action icon: a glossy red flag on a short pole, chunky stylized, slight wave-motion in the fabric, dark metal pole. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a 'surrender' or 'quit match' gameplay action.

Premium mobile game action icon: a glossy orange chat-bubble with a stylized smiling face inside, chunky 3D, gold rim highlight, subtle sparkle. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents opening an emote picker during a match.

Premium mobile game tab icon: a glossy trio of stylized character busts overlapping, warm orange rim light on the front figure, navy shadows behind. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a 'characters' collection tab.

Premium mobile game tab icon: a glossy stack of three tiny loot crates (bronze/silver/gold) with a sparkle above them, chibi stylized. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a 'loot' collection tab.

Premium mobile game tab icon: a glossy gold ribbon medal with a star center and a warm red-white-blue striped ribbon, chunky stylized. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents an 'awards' or 'milestones' collection tab.

Wide horizontal mobile game card art: a stylized Brooklyn blacktop basketball court at dusk, cracked concrete, chain-link fence, graffiti on brick walls in the background, warm orange sunset, distant Brooklyn rowhouse silhouettes. Gritty-yet-polished illustration style. No characters, no text, edges fade softly so the card border can overlay. Premium polish like Basketball Stars arena art. Represents 'The Rec, Brooklyn NY' â€” where every baller starts.

Wide horizontal mobile game card art: a stylized Venice Beach boardwalk basketball court at high noon, sandy edges, palm trees, ocean horizon behind, bright California sun, warm teal-orange palette. Polished illustration style. No characters, no text, edges fade softly. Premium polish. Represents 'The Boardwalk, Venice Beach CA' â€” sun sand and speed.

Wide horizontal mobile game card art: a stylized cathedral-like indoor arena court with high vaulted ceilings, stained glass windows, polished hardwood floor with brass inlay, dramatic stage lighting, deep purple + gold palette. Polished illustration style. No characters, no text, edges fade softly. Premium polish. Represents 'The Cathedral' â€” the holy grail of basketball arenas.

Premium mobile game icon: a chunky glossy gold crown with a red ruby center and a faint purple sparkle, chibi stylized proportions, slight battle-wear. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a boss-level career node.

Premium mobile game settings icon: a glossy orange speaker silhouette with three small curved sound waves, chunky stylized. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a sound-effects toggle.

Premium mobile game settings icon: a glossy orange smartphone silhouette with curved motion-vibration lines radiating outward from both sides, chunky stylized. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a haptic-feedback toggle.

Premium mobile game settings icon: a glossy gold notification bell with a small red dot badge, chunky stylized, slight tilt. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a push-notifications toggle.

Transparent PNG, premium mobile-game character podium foreground element. A wide oval glossy platform disc seen at a slight top-down perspective, rendered in glowing warm orange with a gold rim highlight, dark navy shadow underside, subtle hexagonal tile pattern on the surface catching a bright central spotlight, faint orange ember particles rising from the edges. Centered on a fully transparent background — just the platform object and its light emission, nothing else. Intended to be composited UNDER a 3D character. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers, NO characters, NO other objects. High quality, painterly, AAA mobile aesthetic.

Premium mobile game wide pill button background, 2:1 aspect ratio, isolated on transparent background. A glossy teal-to-emerald gradient pill shape with a bright warm-gold rim highlight on top, subtle inner shadow at bottom, a soft warm pink glow halo radiating outward. Surface has faint hexagonal tile shimmer + a single bright yellow-white lens flare on the left side suggesting a slot-machine reward. Absolutely NO text, NO letters, NO numbers, NO characters, NO icons. Just the premium painted pill button shape + its light emission. AAA mobile-game polish like a Coin Master daily-reward button. Painterly, saturated, glossy.
